meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve no testing knowledge (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no testing knowledge. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Advanced Checklist for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with testing. Use this expert checklist to master AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship high-quality apps faster.
content.answer_block: Stop writing manual tests from scratch. Leverage AI-driven debugging to analyze stack traces, generate edge-case unit tests, and perform root-cause analysis instantly. By integrating Antigravity for architectural visualization and Claude Code for iterative repairs, you transform your lack of testing expertise into a high-speed, automated quality assurance workflow.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, the client deadline is breathing down your neck, and your production environment is screaming with cryptic errors. You didn't write unit tests because you were too busy building features, and now, the codebase feels like a house of cards waiting for a breeze. The silence of the debugger is deafening when you lack the formal testing pedigree to trace a ghost in the machine.

But the era of manual trial-and-error is dead. We are entering an age where your lack of testing knowledge is no longer a bottleneck, but a variable to be solved by high-octane AI agents. By weaponizing tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can effectively outsource the cognitive load of debugging, turning complex failures into solved tickets in minutes.

steps.title: Automated Root-Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed your error logs into the AI to identify patterns that manual inspection misses.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these stack trace logs: [INSERT LOGS]. Identify the specific module causing the memory leak and propose a hotfix.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze the latest error logs in /logs and identify the root cause.'

steps.title: Context-Aware Test Generation
steps.description: Automatically generate unit tests for untested functions to prevent regression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest test suite for this file: [INSERT CODE]. Include edge cases for null values and boundary conditions.

steps.title: Dependency Graph Mapping
steps.description: Visualize how your changes impact downstream services to avoid cascading failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Map the dependencies of this function. Which downstream modules will be affected if I refactor this logic?
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze dependencies for this module and highlight potential breaking changes.'

steps.title: Automated Refactoring & Linting
steps.description: Apply AI-driven refactors that align with modern best practices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this code for performance and readability, ensuring it complies with current TypeScript standards.

steps.title: Continuous Verification Loop
steps.description: Establish a feedback loop where the AI verifies its own fixes against local test suites.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the tests and if they fail, diagnose the error and apply the fix automatically.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Run tests, if failure occurs, analyze output and suggest fix.'

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with your project's specific coding style guide to ensure generated tests match your existing pattern.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store architectural decisions so it doesn't repeat past mistakes in future sessions.
When debugging complex state, ask the AI to generate a sequence diagram via Antigravity to visualize the data flow before coding.
Treat AI-generated tests as a baseline; manually append one 'chaos' test case to ensure the AI isn't hallucinating success.
Always run your CI/CD pipeline locally via a CLI hook before pushing, even if the AI claims the code is bug-free.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI agents into your CI pipeline using GitHub Actions to automate the testing workflow on every pull request.
content.conversion_block: Stop playing catch-up with bugs and start shipping with absolute confidence. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
